properties.subTitle: Sorry, the page you are visiting does not exist.

params.description: Key-value pairs to set in the page state.

url.description: An external URL to link to.

newWindow.description: Open the link in a new window.

input.description: Input to pass to the linked page.

content.description: Box content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Box is clicked.

onPaste.description: Trigger actions when the element is focused and a paste event is triggered.

direction.description: List content along a 'row' or down a 'column'. Applies the 'flex-direction' css property to the List block.

wrap.description: Specifies wrapping style to be applied to List block as 'wrap', 'nowrap' or 'wrap-reverse'. Applies the 'flex-wrap' css property to the List block - defaults to 'wrap', requires List direction to be set.

scroll.description: Specifies whether scrolling should be applied to the List, can be true or false. Applies the 'overflow' css property to the List block - defaults to 'visible', requires List direction to be set.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the List is clicked.

ariaLabel.description: Arial-label to apply to link tag.

back.description: When the link is clicked, trigger the browser back.

home.description: When the link is clicked, route to the home page.

input.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as the input object to the next Lowdefy page.  Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

urlQuery.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as a url query to the next page.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block for anchor icon.

pageId.description: When the link is clicked, route to the provided Lowdefy page.

href.description: The href to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

url.description: External url to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

rel.description: The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

newTab.description: Open link in a new tab when the anchor link is clicked.

replace.description: Prevent adding a new entry into browser history by replacing the url instead of pushing into history. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

scroll.description: Disable scrolling to the top of the page after page transition. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

title.description: Text to display in the anchor.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

DOMPurifyOptions.description: Customize DOMPurify options. Options are only applied when the block is mounted, thus any parsed settings is only applied at first render.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

onTextSelection.description: Trigger action when text is selected and pass selected text to the event object.

name.description: Name of icon to be displayed.

rotate.description: Number of degrees to rotate the icon.

disableLoadingIcon.description: While loading after the icon has been clicked, don't render the loading icon.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when icon is clicked.

alt.description: Alternative text description of the image.

crossOrigin.description: Indicates if the fetching of the image must be done using a CORS request.

decoding.description: An image decoding hint to the browser. Sync for atomic presentation with other content, async,  to reduce delay in presenting other content and auto leave to browser to decide.

loading.description: How the browser should load the image. Eager loads the image immediately, lazy, defers loading until the image it reaches a calculated distance from the viewport, as defined by the browser.

sizes.description: Indicating a set of source sizes of strings separated by commas.

srcSet.description: Possible image sources for the user agent to use, strings separated by commas.

content.description: Span content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Span is clicked.

message.default: Intentional error thrown by Throw block

allowClear.description: Allow the user to clear their input.

autoFocus.description: Autofocus to the block on page load.

bordered.description: Whether or not the text input has a border style.

maxLength.description: The max number of input characters.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside the block before user types input.

prefix.description: Prefix text for the block, priority over $prefix_con.

prefixIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to prefix the text input.

align.description: Align label left or right when inline.

extra.description: Extra text to display beneath the content - supports html.

hasFeedback.description: Display feedback extra from validation, this does not disable validation.

pattern.description: The regular expression pattern to use to sanitize input.

flags.description: The regex flags to use. The default value is 'gm'.

replacement.description: The string used to replace the input that matches the pattern. The default value is ''.

suffix.description: Suffix text for the block, priority over suffixIcon.

suffixIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to suffix the text input.

title.description: Title to describe the input component, if no title is specified the block id is displayed - supports html.

variant.description: Input visual variant. When set, takes precedence over bordered.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

activeBorderColor.description: Border color when the input is focused.

activeShadow.description: Box shadow when the input is focused.

colorFillTertiary.description: Background fill color for the filled variant.

colorText.description: Text color of the input value.

colorTextDisabled.description: Text color when input is disabled.

errorActiveShadow.description: Box shadow when the input has error status and is focused.

hoverBorderColor.description: Border color when the input is hovered.

hoverBg.description: Background color when the input is hovered.

activeBg.description: Background color when the input is focused.

warningActiveShadow.description: Box shadow when the input has warning status and is focused.

onBlur.description: Trigger action event occurs when text input loses focus.

onChange.description: Trigger action when text input is changed.

onFocus.description: Trigger action when text input gets focus.

onPressEnter.description: Trigger action when enter is pressed while text input is focused.

autoFocus.description: Autofocus to the block on page load.

checkedIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to shown when switch is checked (true).

checkedText.description: Text to shown when switch is checked (true).

align.description: Align label left or right when inline.

extra.description: Extra text to display beneath the content - supports html.

hasFeedback.description: Display feedback extra from validation, this does not disable validation.

title.description: Title to describe the input component, if no title is specified the block id is displayed - supports html.

uncheckedIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to shown when switch is unchecked (false).

uncheckedText.description: Text to shown when switch is not checked (false).

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

trackHeightSM.description: Height of the switch track for small size.

trackMinWidth.description: Minimum width of the switch track.

trackMinWidthSM.description: Minimum width of the switch track for small size.

trackPadding.description: Internal padding of the switch track.

handleBg.description: Background color of the switch handle.

handleSizeSM.description: Diameter of the switch handle for small size.

handleShadow.description: Box shadow of the switch handle.

innerMinMargin.description: Minimum margin for inner content (text/icon) of the switch.

innerMaxMargin.description: Maximum margin for inner content (text/icon) of the switch.

innerMinMarginSM.description: Minimum margin for inner content for small size.

innerMaxMarginSM.description: Maximum margin for inner content for small size.

colorPrimary.description: Primary color when the switch is checked.

colorPrimaryHover.description: Primary color on hover when the switch is checked.

colorTextQuaternary.description: Background color when the switch is unchecked.

colorTextTertiary.description: Background color on hover when the switch is unchecked.

onChange.description: Trigger action when switch is changed.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to use as result image.

status.description: Status of the result. Determines image and color.

subTitle.description: Result subtitle or secondary text - supports html.

title.description: Result title or primary text - supports html.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

titleFontSize.description: Font size of the result title.

subtitleFontSize.description: Font size of the result subtitle.

iconFontSize.description: Font size of the result status icon.

extraMargin.description: Margin applied to the extra content area.

colorSuccess.description: Color used for the success status icon.

colorError.description: Color used for the error status icon.

colorInfo.description: Color used for the info status icon.

colorWarning.description: Color used for the warning status icon.

colorTextHeading.description: Color of the result title text.

colorTextDescription.description: Color of the result subtitle text.

paddingLG.description: Large padding value applied to the result container.

lineHeight.description: Line height used for result text content.

content.description: The content of the message - supports html.

duration.description: Time(seconds) before auto-dismiss, don't dismiss if set to 0.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize message icon.

messageStyle.description: Css style to applied to message.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

contentBg.description: Background color of the message content.

contentPadding.description: Padding of the message content. Calculated from controlHeightLG, fontSize, lineHeight, and paddingSM.

onClose.description: Trigger actions when message is closed.

lines.description: Number of paragraph lines of the skeleton.

params.description: Array method params. Accepts array positional args or object with named args depending on method.

oneOf.description: Dot-notation path to value in state.
Dot-notation path to value in state.

default.description: Default value if key does not exist.

oneOf.description: Type of random value to generate.

type.description: Type of random value to generate.

length.description: Length of random string (default 8). Only for type "string".

min.description: Minimum value (inclusive). Only for type "integer" or "float".

max.description: Maximum value (inclusive). Only for type "integer" or "float".

then.description: Value returned when test is true.

else.description: Value returned when test is false.

oneOf.description: Type name to test against state value at current location.

on.description: Value to test the type of.

key.description: State key to test the type of.

tailwind-candidates.css: /* Generated by Lowdefy build — rewritten on page changes to trigger CSS recompilation */
